description: Wiley is a publishing company that provides scholarly journals, books, and online research content through Wiley Online Library. It also offers text and data mining access for authorized users of subscribed Wiley content.
summary: Wiley exposes a documented HTTP Text and Data Mining (TDM) API for downloading Wiley content PDFs, authenticated with a Wiley-issued TDM API token; no public evidence of GraphQL, MCP, or first-party CLI surfaces on wiley.com was found.
